title: Appliance mounting system
abstract: An appliance mounting device is provided herein. The appliance includes a vacuum insulated structure having a liner positioned within a wrapper, wherein the liner and wrapper cooperate to define an interior cavity. The appliance further includes an insulating material positioned within the interior cavity and a hanger coupled to an adapter plate and a support member. The support member is configured to couple to an interior surface of the vacuum insulated structure while maintaining a vacuum in the interior cavity and a holding member is coupled to a first side of the adapter plate and configured to receive a positioning member.
claims: 1. A method for coupling a storage feature to an appliance, comprising: providing a vacuum insulated structure that includes a liner defining an interior compartment; coupling a support member to an interior surface of the liner, wherein the support member defines apertures; coupling a hanger to the support member, the hanger including a hook that extends through a selected one of the apertures of the support member; coupling an outer side of an adapter plate to the hanger, the adapter plate defining a holding member with a receiving channel on an inner side of the adapter plate; coupling a cover to a top edge of the adapter plate to form a shelf; coupling a roller to the holding member proximate to an entrance to the receiving channel; engaging a lower portion of said storage feature with the roller to promote movement of said storage feature along the receiving channel; moving said storage feature along the receiving channel and below the cover with the movement of said storage feature being guided by rotation of the roller; and engaging said storage feature with the holding member of the adapter plate.
